visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a zebra-print bucket hat, a black top, and a white lace cardigan is seen inside a brightly lit warehouse-style supermarket. She is smiling excitedly at the camera while holding a large, clear-lidded cardboard cake box containing a walnut-topped cake. (2) Close-up shot of the cake box resting on a metal supermarket conveyor belt. The label clearly shows the product name and a price tag of 399. (3) The woman is back on screen, gesturing with her hands and giving a thumbs up towards the camera. The background shows the checkout area and other shoppers in the distance. (4) Scene transition to an indoor home setting, likely a living room. Two women are now seated at a table with the same cake, which has been opened. They are holding plates and forks, taking bites and reacting with positive facial expressions like wide eyes and smiles. (5) Close-up shots of the cake reveal its interior layers of light brown sponge and cream, with crushed walnuts visible inside the cake body. (6) The women continue their review, pointing at the cake and giving more thumbs-up gestures. The background shows a home interior with a couch and domestic items.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Slogan]: 必買史上最好吃蛋糕. [Subtitle]: 祝你生日快樂. (2) [Slogan]: 399元. [Subtitle]: 核桃伯爵蛋糕. (3) [Subtitle]: 那麼便宜. [Subtitle]: 就算不是生日. [Subtitle]: 也可以慶祝. (4) [Subtitle]: 8吋耶而且. [Subtitle]: 他核桃量很多. (5) [Subtitle]: 大家記得選. [Subtitle]: 期限最新鮮的. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為. [Subtitle]: 它可以放三天. (7) [Subtitle]: 回去試試看看. (8) [Subtitle]: 這是我們. [Subtitle]: 吃過好市多. [Subtitle]: 有史以來. [Slogan]: 最好吃的蛋糕. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的伯爵茶茶香. [Subtitle]: 比較是阿薩姆奶. [Subtitle]: 茶的茶香味. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後核桃量. [Subtitle]: 給的超多. [Subtitle]: 連蛋糕體. [Subtitle]: 裡面都有. (11) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它的. [Subtitle]: 蛋糕體啊. [Subtitle]: 是伯爵茶香味. (12) [Subtitle]: 濕度也足夠. [Subtitle]: 所以你吃起來就是. [Subtitle]: 好順滑. (13) [Subtitle]: 奶油慕斯也是. [Subtitle]: 口感都很順滑. [Subtitle]: 完全不會乾口. (14) [Subtitle]: 這這年來好市多. [Subtitle]: 蛋糕款式裡面. [Subtitle]: 算很不甜的一款. (15) [Subtitle]: 對甜度也低. [Subtitle]: 所以全家人. [Subtitle]: 都很適合. (16) [Slogan]: 非常非常有senses. [Subtitle]: 我覺得好市多. [Subtitle]: 你做的太棒了. [Subtitle]: 請繼續維持. [Subtitle]: 這個一定要試試看. (17) [Subtitle]: 居然不是萬年的. [Subtitle]: 黃色海綿體蛋糕. (18) [Subtitle]: 它整個茶香是. [Subtitle]: 融入整個蛋糕. [Subtitle]: 然後配上那個. [Subtitle]: 滿滿的核桃. (19) [Subtitle]: 最有口感. [Subtitle]: 最不甜. [Subtitle]: 真的很好吃. [Subtitle]: 這個好棒.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appear throughout the video reviewing the food.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a zebra-patterned hat and a lace cardigan; the other has long dark hair and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set in a Costco warehouse with metal shelves and checkout counters; the second half is in a modern home living room with a brown sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and bouncy pop-style BGM begins immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks with rapid speed and clear articulation, punctuating her discovery. Short, bright 'pop' sound effects are used to mark visual transitions. (2) The acoustic space narrows from a public warehouse hum to a dryer indoor environment. A second female voice joins in, maintaining high energy. The BGM continues throughout, remaining balanced below the vocals. (3) Soft, percussive chewing sounds and the faint rattle of plastic packaging are audible. The primary speaker's pitch fluctuates dramatically as she expresses delight. (4) Frequent hard cuts in the audio track create a dense, informative rhythm. Cartoonish 'ding' SFX emphasize key descriptors of the product being reviewed.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Texture/Taste Review -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly positive and enthusiastic review of a specific Costco product (Walnut Earl Grey Cake), aiming to influence the audience's purchasing decisions by emphasizing its value, ingredients, and taste.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly features Costco branding, shows the packaging and price, and provides a purely positive review focused on product benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A classic example of social-media native food review content, utilizing high-density subtitles, fast editing, and high-arousal vocal delivery to capture attention.
